title: selaginella involvens var. bellula
intro: Selaginella involvens var. bellula, also known as the bell-shaped spikemoss, is a rare and unique species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are said to have various health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and boosting the immune system. The plant is often prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various ailments. Further research is needed to confirm the efficacy and safety of using Selaginella involvens var. bellula for medicinal purposes, but it is still utilized by some practitioners of traditional medicine.
